response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack and polyglot engineer with deep experience in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, but the role explicitly requires 8 years of C++ programming and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/distributed systems work, neither of which is evidenced in the resume. C++ exposure appears limited to a ~6-month stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015, and there is no demonstrated cloud compute platform or technical leadership experience at the required scale.
strengths: Broad polyglot engineering background spanning web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Strong software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, pairing)
Experience with high-throughput, low-latency microservices at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
concerns: Minimal C++ experience — only ~6 months at NI, far below the 8-year requirement
No clear large-scale cloud compute platform or distributed-systems leadership experience
No formal technical leadership role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud compute platform / large-scale distributed systems background
Software craftsmanship and polyglot engineering breadth
